problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: The key to What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? is Shape memory alloy phase transition — specifically Shape memory alloy — which would help 2,200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
